category_sources: source_facts.description says tab completion for Python argparse; official docs cover argcomplete shell completion integration.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is python-argcomplete but upstream docs title is argcomplete documentation.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official documentation site; the docs page links project home, documentation, distribution, and changelog.
repo_sources: Official argcomplete documentation links the project home page on GitHub; GitHub repository is kislyuk/argcomplete.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official docs describe Python argparse tab completion and CLI completion behavior.
